title: Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited!
